user.title: Connect to SunRiser
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your SunRiser device.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of your SunRiser controller on the local network (e.g. 192.168.1.100 or sunriser).
data_description.port: The HTTP port the SunRiser web server listens on. Leave as 80 unless you have changed it.

dhcp_confirm.title: SunRiser discovered
dhcp_confirm.description: A SunRiser device was found at {host}. Do you want to add it?

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check the host and port.
error.timeout: Connection timed out. Check the host and port.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the HA logs for details.

abort.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the discovered device.
abort.timeout: Connection to the discovered device timed out.
abort.unknown: Unexpected error connecting to the discovered device.

data_description.scan_interval: How often (in seconds) to poll the device for updated PWM and sensor values. Lower values give faster updates but increase load on the controller.

backup_retrieve_failed.message: Failed to retrieve backup from SunRiser: {error}

path_not_allowed.message: Path not allowed by Home Assistant: {path}

restore_failed.message: Failed to restore backup to SunRiser: {error}

get_errors_failed.message: Failed to retrieve error log from SunRiser: {error}

get_log_failed.message: Failed to retrieve log from SunRiser: {error}

factory_backup_retrieve_failed.message: Failed to retrieve factory backup from SunRiser: {error}

factory_backup_write_failed.message: Failed to write factory backup file: {error}

firmware_retrieve_failed.message: Failed to retrieve firmware info from SunRiser: {error}

bootload_retrieve_failed.message: Failed to retrieve bootload info from SunRiser: {error}

factory_reset_failed.message: Failed to send factory reset to SunRiser: {error}
